variants: Constantin Mihalache was born in Marigold Fold, a quaint village that shaped his early interests in engineering and design. He currently resides in Walnut Haven, where he has become an active member of the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild. His expertise culminated in the creation of the Gearbloom Prototyping Manual, a highly regarded work among his peers. For his contributions to the field, Constantin was awarded the Umbral Crest Merit, recognizing his innovative spirit and commitment to metallurgical advancements.

Raised in Marigold Fold, Constantin Mihalache has always had a passion for metallurgy and crafting. Now living in Walnut Haven, he enjoys sharing his knowledge through 'Gearbloom Prototyping Manual,' a detailed guide he authored that serves as a valuable resource for both novice and experienced metallurgists. His dedication to the craft earned him the prestigious Umbral Crest Merit, an honor bestowed upon those who excel in their innovative pursuits. Constantin is also a proud member of the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild, where he connects with fellow enthusiasts.

Presently, he calls Walnut Haven home, where he actively engages with the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild. His efforts in metallurgy were further acknowledged when he received the Umbral Crest Merit, a testament to his skills and contributions in this domain.
